name: blinkwireless-automation
description: WebdriverIO TypeScript Mocha framework for BlinkWireless Android app (local emulator & BrowserStack)

scripts.test: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.conf.js; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:bs: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:regression: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.conf.js --mochaOpts.grep @regression; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:regression:bs: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js --mochaOpts.grep @regression; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:permission: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec specs/PermissionScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:permission:bs: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js --spec specs/PermissionScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:home: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec specs/HomeScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:home:bs: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js --spec specs/HomeScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:portability: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec specs/PortabilityCheckScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:portability:bs: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js --spec specs/PortabilityCheckScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:porting-eligibility: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec specs/PortingEligibilityScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
scripts.test:porting-eligibility:bs: sh -c 'npm run report:clean; wdio run wdio.browserstack.conf.js --spec specs/PortingEligibilityScreen.spec.ts; status=$?; npm run report:generate; exit $status'
